programme.desc: Farm Hero season one concludes in Pescadero, California at TomKat Ranch. Laura dissects what’s wrong with our food system on a macro scale and what the average consumer can do to fight back with intentional shopping. Next, rancher Mike Biaggi introduces “the five why’s” and how they apply to holistic management and regenerative agriculture. As we cap off season one, Laura and the team raise their glasses to all the Farm Heroes on the front lines, salvaging our food systems for our fellow Americans and viewers like you.

They meet a passionate team turning donated land into a homestead that feeds and shelters trafficking survivors. Then, CCW Safe steps in to showcase how legal protection for concealed carriers can be the line between justice and ruin. Powerful stories of resilience, protection, and purpose unfold in this compelling first episode.

programme.title: Winter's Grace, Sierra Mountains

programme.title: Autumn's Grace: The Wasatch Mountains
programme.desc: The Wasatch mountains of Utah display nature's finest autumn colors. The stunning spectrum of the landscape ranges from dark reds to bright yellows, splashed across the mountains in exuberant splendor. A soothing acoustic soundtrack accompanies the scenery, filmed from above and within the autumn paradise of the Wasatch mountains. Run time approx. 1 hour 50 minutes.

programme.title: Preview for Croatia's Plitvice Lakes - Europe's Natural Wonders Episode 2
programme.desc: 🌊 Europe’s Natural Wonders, Episode 2: Croatia’s Plitvice Lakes 🇭🇷 | Official Preview Trailer ✨ Step into a fairytale world of turquoise lakes, cascading waterfalls, and emerald forests in Croatia’s Plitvice Lakes National Park — one of Europe’s most extraordinary natural treasures. This short film is the official preview trailer for our full 2-hour cinematic nature experience, Europe’s Natural Wonders – Episode 2: Croatia’s Plitvice Lakes, now streaming in breathtaking 4K on NatureStream.tv. 🎬 Journey along elevated wooden boardwalks as crystal waters flow from one lake to another through lush karst landscapes. Captured in ultra-high resolution, this film immerses you in the sights and sounds of one of UNESCO’s most iconic World Heritage Sites.

programme.title: The Scoop
programme.desc: On this episode of The Scoop we recap Week 5 of the PLL! Connor Shellenberger rallied the reigning champs to a 2-0 homecoming weekend, Jared Valluzzi joins the show live from Long Island to recap the wins, and we caught up with Inside Lacrosse’s Chris Rosenthall to break down the rest of the weekend across the PLL and WLL.

programme.title: Losing Is Worse Than Death | The Bill Tierney Documentary
programme.desc: Coach Bill Tierney is a legend. Over his five decade coaching career, he's accomplished almost everything: NCAA Championships, Coach of the Year honors, induction into the Hall of Fame. The last accomplishment left for his resume? A PLL Championship. Philadelphia finished 2-8 in Coach Tierney's inaugural year at the helm. Now in his second season, Tierney is aiming to right the ship and has his sights on one more ring.

programme.title: The Story of Brennan O’Neill
programme.desc: Brennan O’Neill’s rare combination of size, speed, and power has made him one of the most dominant forces in lacrosse. From prodigy to professional, his physical presence has reshaped the game. But as competition intensifies and defenses adjust, this feature explores how dominance is tested at the highest level, and asks one question: Is dominance enough?

programme.title: Connor Shellenberger | 2025 Season Highlights
programme.desc: The New York Atlas attackman had a historic sophomore season including the Jim Brown MVP Award and a Championship.

programme.title: Mitchell Pehlke Lacrosse Show
programme.desc: On Episode 17 of Season 3 of the Mitchell Pehlke Lacrosse Show, Matt Rambo joins the guys to talk about his move to the New York Atlas, how he’s encouraged Connor Shellenberger, and what it was like to beat old friend Colin Heacock… who he promptly FaceTimed onto the show. Mitchell and the guys broke down the PLL weekend on Long Island, Asher Nolting’s release from the Boston Cannons, and updates in the college lacrosse world including Lars Tiffany’s lawsuit, Ohio State’s assistant coaching carousel, and Richmond's massive donation.

programme.title: S1E5 The Jackson Goldstone Story
programme.desc: Beyond Limits: The Jackson Goldstone Story is an electrifying YouTube series that follows mountain biking sensation Jackson Goldstone through his 2023 UCI Downhill World Championship season. Watch as he pushes his limits on some of the most dangerous downhill courses in the world, from steep, rocky descents to twisting forest trails, attacking every challenge with unmatched skill and determination. Go behind the scenes to see the intense training sessions, precise bike tuning, and mental preparation that fuel his success. Experience the rush of high-stakes racing with heart-pounding runs, fierce rivalries, and moments that will keep you holding your breath. More than just the action, Beyond Limits reveals Jackson’s personal journey, the sacrifices he makes for his passion, and the powerful support network that drives him forward. This is the ultimate inside look at a world-class athlete chasing glory on two wheels.

programme.title: S1E1 Moto
programme.desc: Two brothers. Two motorcycles. Ride along with GoPro Family members Carlos and Alex Costa on the adventure of a lifetime as they explore the vibrant cities and stunning beaches of Morocco. Plus, enjoy exclusive bonus footage featuring the very best of GoPro Motorsports.

programme.title: S1E2 Moto
programme.desc: The journey continues as we follow two brothers on their 2,300-kilometer adventure across Morocco. Two brothers. Two motorcycles. Ride along with GoPro Family members Carlos and Alex Costa as they experience vibrant cities, breathtaking beaches, and the adventure of a lifetime. Plus, enjoy bonus footage of Jeremy Seewer. With 50 podiums, 11 victories, 17 race wins, and five FIM Motocross World Championship silver medals, his record is remarkable — yet his story goes far beyond the numbers.

programme.title: S2E1 Moto
programme.desc: Celebrate the women of GoPro, including British rally driver Catie Munnings, who rose to fame after winning the FIA European Rally Championship Ladies Trophy at just 18. Watch snowboarder Alina Hight who made history as the first to land a double backside alley-oop rodeo in a halfpipe competition. Meet Teigan Nash, co-founder of Girls Who Glow, inspiring young women everywhere. Plus, experience even more of the very best from GoPro Motorsports.

programme.title: S3E1 Moto
programme.desc: GoPro Athlete and Formula 1 star Daniel Ricciardo teams up with Race Service Co-Founder James Kirkham for an unforgettable ride through Los Angeles. With eight Grand Prix victories and 32 podiums to his name, the Honey Badger spends his day off behind the wheel of supercars like the Ford GT, racing past Beverly Hills, the Sunset Strip, and into the winding roads of Benedict Canyon. Plus, enjoy even more of the very best from GoPro Motorsports.
